\tzpentry{ID3652}{Quantum Quantum State Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3652 introduces Quantum Quantum State Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} i\hbar\frac{\partial\Psi}{\partial t} = -\frac{\hbar^2}{2m}\nabla^2\Psi + g|\Psi|^2\Psi - \int_{-\infty}^t \mathcal{G}_{\text{acc}}[\tau]|\Psi(\tau)|^2 e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{dec}}} d\tau \cdot \Psi \end{equation}
